entityTypes.name: leads
entityTypes.description: Inbound sales inquiries synced into this workspace for first-touch response. Not yet wired for most workspaces — see the bot's sync-leads setup step.

email.description: Lead's contact email. Never copy into a receipt.

name.description: Lead's stated name. Never copy into a receipt.

sourceTier.description: Plan tier the inquiry was tagged with (e.g. enterprise).

source.description: Which page/surface the inquiry came from (e.g. public-pricing, plan-tab, license-page).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the inquiry arrived. The baseline for every latency receipt.

demoStatus.description: Set once a demo-scheduling integration exists. Absent today.

entityTypes.name: receipt
entityTypes.description: One record per action this bot takes: a draft submitted, a latency measured, an escalation sent. PII-free by design.

subject.description: The lead record's entityId. Never an email, name, or company.
